title: bidens schaffneri var. wrightii
intro: Bidens schaffneri var. wrightii, also known as Wright's beggarticks, is a variety of the Bidens schaffneri plant, a flowering plant in the aster family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Bidens schaffneri var. wrightii include its ability to reduce pain, inflammation, and fever, as well as its potential to treat skin conditions and respiratory issues. Bidens schaffneri var. wrightii is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with some herbalists also using it in salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
